author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Result: committed 7dd76ed3 on feature/576-publish-agent-container-image. Single workflow file edit (+26 -9). arm64 leg switched to cross-rs (installed via taiki-e/install-action — prebuilt binary, fast); amd64 stays native musl-tools build. Matrix gains use_cross flag with inline comment explaining WHY arm64 needs cross (so a future reader doesn't 'simplify' back to the broken glibc-cross pattern). YAML validated. Ready for user push (fast-forward on top of 725e5542). PR #578 picks up automatically. Watch the next CI run — both arches should build cleanly this time.
